title: Sucheta Dalal moves Delhi court against ban on media reports linking Manoj Sandesara to Sterling Biotech fraud
description: Journalist Sucheta Dalal has moved a Delhi court challenging the order banning any news content linking Manoj Kesari Chand Sandesara or his family members to the alleged Sterling Biotech bank fraud case. District Judge Vinod Kumar Meena of the Tis Hazari Courts heard the matter on April 13 and issued notice to Manoj Sandesara, Google and Meta. The case will be heard next on April 29.Dalal’s Moneywise Media LLP – which runs Moneylife magazine and digital news portal – has challenged the
